---
name: Specification Issue or Proposal
about: Raise a question, clarification, or improvement idea for ONVIF specifications
---

## Subject
<!-- A short summary to help others quickly understand the topic -->

## Background / Context
<!--
If helpful, share any background that makes the issue easier to understand.
This might include ambiguities, interoperability observations, or missing guidance.
-->

## Problem Statement
<!--
Describe the issue in neutral, observable terms.
It’s perfectly fine to focus only on the problem without suggesting a solution.
-->

## Affected Specification Areas
<!--
Specification name(s), version(s), or section(s), if known.
Feel free to leave this empty if unsure.
-->

## Expected Outcome (optional)
<!--
If you have a sense of what a good resolution might look like, you can note it here.
This is optional and can remain high-level.
-->

## Additional Information (optional)
<!-- Links, examples, or related discussions, if any -->
